invariants: Degree-2 contact is not promoted to all-degree transfer.
The rejected all-order signed-Hankel antecedent is not used as a bridge hypothesis.
Selected low-order Toeplitz minors are not promoted to Jensen-window PF-infinity.
Endpoint PF, Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, and Lambda <= 0 are forbidden as inputs.
proof_boundary: Finite theorem-search diagnostic only. It combines exact low-degree algebra and finite countermodel gates to specify the missing transfer theorem, but it does not prove sign-regular-to-Jensen conversion, Jensen-window PF-infinity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

summary.main_finding: The signed-Hankel/Jensen bridge is exact only at degree 2. The degree-3/4 countermodel gates show that finite reshaped-Hankel signs and selected low-order Toeplitz positivity do not imply Jensen-window PF-infinity. The all-order signed-Hankel antecedent is itself false at order ten, so a proof needs a weaker Xi/Phi-specific kernel, determinant, or direct Jensen theorem with binomial and shift uniformity.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Use this as the contact point only; do not extrapolate it to all degrees.
transfer_rows.claim: Degree 2 is exact: the m=1 signed-Hankel condition is the Jensen-window quadratic discriminant threshold.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Exact low-degree contact only; not a sign-regular-to-Jensen transfer theorem.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: A proposed bridge must prove these cubic obligations from its stated hypotheses.
transfer_rows.claim: Degree 3 introduces a cubic discriminant and Toeplitz minors that are not signed reshaped-Hankel minors.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Exact algebraic obstruction only; not a theorem for the zeta coefficients.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Reject any bridge that uses only finite low-order reshaped-Hankel signs.
transfer_rows.claim: A positive rational sequence passes finite reshaped-Hankel signs for k=2,3 at N=3 while its degree-3 Jensen discriminant is negative.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Countermodel gate only; it is not a claim about the actual zeta sequence.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Reject any bridge that certifies only selected low-order Jensen-window Toeplitz minors.
transfer_rows.claim: The same positive rational sequence has selected low-order degree-3 and degree-4 Toeplitz minors positive while later contiguous Toeplitz minors and discriminants are negative.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Countermodel gate only; not an all-minor theorem.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: State an exact kernel, determinant, or variation-diminishing condition and prove it for the actual A_k(0) without all-shift signed-Hankel positivity.
transfer_rows.claim: The bridge needs a weaker Xi/Phi-specific antecedent that is actually satisfied despite the negative order-ten signed-Hankel endpoint minors.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Open replacement antecedent only; the former all-order signed-Hankel requirement is rejected.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Identify a positive kernel, determinant integral, production/network model, or sign-regular transfer theorem whose hypotheses are verified for A_k(0).
transfer_rows.claim: A viable bridge must add noncircular Xi/Phi-specific structure that is absent from arbitrary positive sequences.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Open bridge requirement only; no such theorem is proved here.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Handle binom(d,j), every d, every n, and every Toeplitz minor shape in one theorem.
transfer_rows.claim: The transfer must output every binomially weighted Jensen-window Toeplitz matrix for all degrees and shifts.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Open uniformity requirement only; finite rectangles are rejected elsewhere.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: The theorem must imply all Jensen-window PF conditions without assuming Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.
transfer_rows.claim: An acceptable theorem may prove a sign-regular-to-Toeplitz transfer, a positive determinant integral, or an Xi/Phi positive-kernel identity that directly gives the Jensen-window PF target.
transfer_rows.proof_boundary: Live contract only; no candidate is ready to apply.

transfer_rows.acceptance_test: Reject any proposed proof step that avoids an all-degree/all-shift Xi/Phi theorem with one of these shortcuts.
transfer_rows.claim: Finite grids, degree-2 analogy, selected minors, endpoint PF/LP assumptions, and asymptotic Jensen statements are forbidden as bridge replacements.
